mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_board ( board_id, product_name, product_link, product_image, category1, category2 ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{productName}, #{productLink}, #{productImage}, #{category1}, #{category2} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.board_id, m.username, mem.nickname, m.title, m.content, m.created_at, m.edited_at, m.view_cnt, m.reply_cnt, r.product_name, r.product_link, r.product_image, r.category1, r.category2 FROM master_board m INNER JOIN review_board r on m.board_id = r.board_id INNER JOIN member mem on m.username = mem.username WHERE m.board_type = 'review' AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.board_id desc;

SELECT m.board_id, m.username, mem.nickname, m.title, m.content, m.created_at, m.edited_at, m.view_cnt, m.reply_cnt, r.product_name, r.product_link, r.product_image, r.category1, r.category2 FROM master_board m INNER JOIN review_board r ON m.board_id = r.board_id INNER JOIN member mem ON m.username = mem.username WHERE m.board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_file SET original_name = #{originalName}, saved_name = #{savedName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize} WHERE file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.select: SELECT category1 FROM review_board WHERE board_id = #{value}

SELECT
rb.product_name, rb.board_id, rb.category1, rb.category2, mb.title, mb.content, mb.created_at, mb.view_cnt, mb.reply_cnt
FROM review_board rb JOIN master_board mb on rb.board_id = mb.board_id WHERE deleted=0 and mb.username=#{username} ORDER BY mb.created_at DESC

SELECT
rb.product_name, rb.board_id, rb.category1, rb.category2, mb.title, mb.content, mb.created_at, mb.view_cnt, mb.reply_cnt, bf.saved_name AS savedName
FROM review_board rb JOIN master_board mb on rb.board_id = mb.board_id JOIN board_file bf on rb.board_id=bf.board_id WHERE deleted=0 ORDER BY mb.view_cnt DESC
